title: Apple raises prices of its Mac and iPad due to increase in RAM cost
summary: The company increases the price of its computers and tablets by up to 20%, while keeping the price of the iPhone, which is spared from the increase.

title: Rockstar reveals the price of GTA VI and confirms that the full version requires 100 euros
summary: The game will cost 80 euros in its basic edition, but will include all content only in the 100-euro Ultimate version, and will be exclusively digital.

title: Microsoft raises the price of Xbox Series X|S consoles worldwide
summary: The company increases the price of its consoles by up to 150 dollars, following Apple's trend and citing economic conditions.

title: Concern about AI-generated content: from AI-written books to children's voices in kids' shows
summary: Several reports warn about the use of artificial intelligence to write books, clone voices of child actors in 'Peppa Pig', and the conversion of Grok into an adult platform.

title: Meta faces challenges in its artificial intelligence strategy
summary: The company reverses the reassignment of employees to AI roles, while employees warn that the deployment of AI moderation is too fast and criticism grows about the direction of the company.

title: Regulation of artificial intelligence: multimillion-dollar fines, requested pauses, and ethical debate
summary: Big tech companies are fined 3.5 billion for using personal data to train AI, the White House asks OpenAI to slow down its launches, and the Pope declares that AI cannot be morally neutral.

title: Valve removes references to 4K and blames RAM manufacturers for the price of the Steam Machine
summary: The company removes mentions of 4K performance from its console and blames memory suppliers for the high cost, despite its success in Japan.

title: Polymarket suffers a cyberattack that steals millions of dollars from users
summary: The decentralized betting platform confirmed the theft of funds and promised refunds to those affected.

title: Notion shuts down its email service Notion Mail after just over a year
summary: The company decides to discontinue the email client to focus on artificial intelligence agents.

title: Google launches standalone Google Finance app with real-time data
summary: The new app for Android offers updated financial information, artificial intelligence, and portfolio tracking.

title: Micron secures historic high-price agreements for DRAM and NAND until 2030
summary: The semiconductor company signs long-term contracts that skyrocket prices and affect the consumer market.

title: IBM unveils the world's first sub-1 nanometer chip
summary: IBM's new processor marks a milestone in semiconductor miniaturization with a node smaller than a nanometer.

title: United States bans the sale of Polestar vehicles in the country
summary: The Trump administration prevents the Swedish electric car brand from selling its new models in the US, while Volvo escapes the restriction.

title: US strengthens alliance with Netherlands in chip manufacturing and invests in xLight
summary: The North American country integrates the Netherlands into the anti-China Pax Silica bloc and allocates $150 million to EUV technology.

title: Return-to-office mandates linked to executive narcissism
summary: A study links the trait of narcissism in Fortune 500 leaders with return-to-office orders, while Goldman Sachs and JPMorgan soften their stance.

title: Developers bet on alternative methods for training AI: physical robots and video games
summary: Tech companies explore training artificial intelligences through real environments and games, with an investment of $2.3 billion in the sector.

title: Windows 10 extends support until 2027 and Windows 11 introduces a full restore
summary: Microsoft quietly extends Windows 10 support due to user resistance to upgrade, and adds a tool to restore apps, settings, and files in Windows 11.

title: Amazon bets on artificial intelligence for Prime Day and invests $13 billion in India
summary: The company promotes its AI assistant during the shopping event and announces a major investment in AI infrastructure in India.

title: Video game industry suffers new layoffs at Xbox and Bungie
summary: Former Xbox employees report retaliation after complaining about their positions, while Sony confirms significant layoffs at Bungie, including most of the Destiny team.

title: Leaks and cyberattacks: customer data deleted and Chrome extension with malicious capability
summary: The company Klue suffers a hack and criminals delete the stolen data, while an ad blocker with millions of installations hides a script injection vulnerability.
